content.content: Bob shared some discounts via email. Please check the SSD I bought today and see if Bob's discount would have been cheaper. If so, refund my purchase and rebuy it using his discount.

<function_thought>
In order to help Emma Johnson with her request, I will begin by checking the unread emails in her shopping account to locate any information regarding the discounts shared by Bob. Following this, I will proceed to view her order history to identify the SSD purchased today, and subsequently check the invoice for that order to see if a refund is necessary. If the discount found is beneficial, I'll proceed with the refund and use the discount to make a new purchase. 
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_shopping_linked_unread_emails()]</function_call>
